overview: Sree Dattha Institute of Engineering and Science (SDES), established in 2001 by the Vyjayanthi Educational Society under the leadership of Sri G. Panduranga Reddy, is a premier autonomous engineering institution located on Nagarjuna Sagar Road in Sheriguda, Ibrahimpatnam, Greater Hyderabad, Telangana. The institute is dedicated to providing high-quality technical education across multiple engineering and management disciplines, fostering an environment of strong industry readiness, continuous career training, and comprehensive academic excellence.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status; Accredited by NAAC with 'A+' Grade; Flagship technical programs are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA) and approved by the AICTE.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Flagship & Emerging Programs (CSE, CSE-AIML, CSE-Data Science, CSE-IT, CSE-Business Systems, ECE)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹95,000 per year. Total estimated tuition course fee is approximately ₹3,80,000.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Core Programs (Electrical & Electronics, Civil, Mechanical Engineering)

placements.totalOffers: 924+ total job offers with over 704 individual students successfully placed
placements.companiesVisited: Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Amazon, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, HCL, Google, Reliance Industries
placements.internshipHighlights: Industry-driven preparation including global SAP International Certifications completed by students

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are governed by Telangana State guidelines where 70% of intake is filled through the Convenor Quota (Category A) via state counseling, and 30% of seats are reserved for Management Quota (Category B) direct admissions.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions align precisely with the annual state-level counseling timelines managed by TSCHE and JNTUH.

campus.specialNote: Hostels feature spacious 3-to-4 member sharing rooms with attached washrooms, continuous water supply, student-led Mess Committees, and television recreation systems.

contact.address: Sree Dattha Institute of Engineering and Science, Nagarjuna Sagar Road, Sheriguda, Ibrahimpatnam, Rangareddy, Telangana – 501510, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Fee concessions granted by the Vyjayanthi Educational Society for high-merit engineering aspirants.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition coverage for highly ranked state-level entrance exam achievers as per government directives.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Academic institutional awards and tuition reductions for exceptional performance in internal assessments.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full fee reimbursement structures provided to SC, ST, BC, EWS, and minority students through the Telangana State ePASS scholarship scheme.
